final:
// // This module subtracts A from B when S is 0, and adds A and B when S is 1.
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    input S,
    output reg [3:0] F
);always @(*) begin
    if (S == 0) begin
        F = A + B;
    end else begin
        F = A - B;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module subtracts A from B when S is 0, and adds A and B when S is 1.
